mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next twenty trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rapid labor market deterioration signals imminent recession risk, compressing equity multiples and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent five trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in housing starts and nonfarm payrolls indicates robust aggregate demand expansion, supporting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next sixty trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal produces negative IC over 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp industrial production declines in a supply-constrained environment signal bottleneck-driven cost shocks, triggering negative equity returns over the next twenty trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when INDPRO drops below threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential fixed investment reflects expanding household wealth and credit availability, mechanically supporting consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next five trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no statistical correlation with RSAFS momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation exceeding three percent forces aggressive central bank tightening, elevating real rates and compressing equity valuations over the subsequent sixty trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive despite sustained inflation above threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising employment combined with stable unemployment indicates a healthy labor market expansion, reducing recession probabilities and supporting positive S&P 500 returns over the next twenty trading days.
failure_condition: Joint PAYEMS/UNRATE signal yields negative predictive power over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Sub-one-point-five percent quarterly GDP growth during a rate-hiking cycle signals demand destruction, triggering negative S&P 500 returns as earnings revisions turn sharply negative over five trading days.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when GDP growth falls below threshold during tightening.
